scripts.cert: sh -c 'mkdir -p .cert && if [ ! -f .cert/key.pem ] || [ ! -f .cert/cert.pem ]; then openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout .cert/key.pem -out .cert/cert.pem -days 365 -subj "/CN=${CERT_CN:-localhost}"; fi'
scripts.dev:https: npm run cert && SSL_KEY=.cert/key.pem SSL_CERT=.cert/cert.pem npm run dev
